name: Basic Stir-Fry Sauce - Reid
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken broth and oyster sauce in a small bowl.
2. Whisk in the cornstarch until the mixture is smooth.
3. Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Pour the sauce into the hot pan, stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
5. Continue cooking until the sauce thickens, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Add steamed vegetables, mushrooms, and other desired ingredients to the sauce.
7. Serve over a bed of basmati rice.
Note: Tofu is also very good with this sauce.
